entries.name: Attachment
entries.description: A non-interactive compact file card showing a category glyph, name, and formatted size for one attached file.

entries.name: Avatar
entries.description: A compact circular identity mark that shows a photo, initials, or a fallback glyph for one person.

entries.name: Badge
entries.description: A non-interactive status tag with an intent-keyed color and a matching non-color glyph.

entries.name: Bar Chart
entries.description: An axis-free horizontal bar list that compares magnitudes with a printed value, no ticks or legend.

entries.name: Button
entries.description: ui-button is the reference FACE control — a light-DOM custom element that renders an activatable button.

entries.name: Calendar
entries.description: A month-grid date picker form control that selects a single date or a start/end date range.

entries.name: Card
entries.description: ui-card is the surface container of the G9 layout family — the first non-form container with a default plane.

entries.name: Checkbox
entries.description: ui-checkbox is a FACE form-associated Indicator-class control (extends UIIndicatorElement → UIFormElement, ADR-0042).

entries.name: Code
entries.description: A zero-machinery block that displays verbatim, whitespace-preserved code with its own horizontal scroll.

entries.name: Code Editor
entries.description: A form-associated, editable-first source editor with markdown syntax highlighting — a plain contenteditable surface that CodeMirror 6 progressively enhances (lazy-loaded, ADR-0139), with an opt-in richtext live-preview mode (decoration-rendered over the SAME document, ADR-0147); the editor counterpart of the display-only ui-code.

entries.name: Color Picker
entries.description: A color-input control combining a 2D chroma-lightness pad, three channel sliders, and an editable readout.

entries.name: Column
entries.description: ui-column is the vertical A2UI layout primitive — ui-row's sibling with the main axis flipped to the block axis (flex-direction: column).

entries.name: Combo Box
entries.description: ui-combo-box is a FACE form-associated combo-box: a contenteditable text input + a top-layer listbox panel (Popover API).

entries.name: Command Modal
entries.description: ui-command-modal is a Pattern-class UIElement coordinator — the classic CMD-K command palette.

entries.name: Disclosure
entries.description: A one-line summary that expands or collapses its content, built on the native <details> element.

entries.name: Field
entries.description: ui-field is the visible label / description / error wrapper around ONE slotted form control.

entries.name: Form Provider
entries.description: ui-form-provider is the fleet's first context/provider primitive — a pure coordination layer over UIFormElement descendants (ADR-0050).

entries.name: Grid
entries.description: A responsive track-grid container that fits as many columns as its own width allows, no breakpoints needed.

entries.name: Icon
entries.description: ui-icon is the Display-class icon primitive — the declarative consumer surface over the @agent-ui/icons adapter (ADR-0065/0066).

entries.name: Ladder
entries.description: A labeled list of dimensional tiers shown as literal-length bars alongside their printed values.

entries.name: List
entries.description: ui-list is a semantic vertical stack — a ui-column specialization that adds list semantics.

entries.name: Markdown
entries.description: ui-markdown is the Display-class, flagship element of the code+prose family (ADR-0119, M1) — it renders the agent-common markdown subset into real fleet DOM, s…

entries.name: Menu
entries.description: A keyboard-navigable overlay menu opened from a trigger, with roving focus and type-ahead selection.

entries.name: Modal
entries.description: ui-modal is a modal dialog built on the native <dialog> element opened with showModal() (ADR-0017).

entries.name: Popover
entries.description: ui-popover is a disclosure popover built on the Overlay controller (overlay-controller.lld.md · ADR-0043) and the native Popover API.

entries.name: Progress
entries.description: ui-progress is the Display-class thin-rail progress bar (feed family v1, ADR-0112) — bar-only task progress with a native-<progress>-shaped value model.

entries.name: Radio
entries.description: A single radio-button control, typically grouped inside a ui-radio-group for exclusive selection.

entries.name: Radio Group
entries.description: A form-associated container that gives its ui-radio children exclusive selection and roving-focus navigation.

entries.name: Ramp
entries.description: An ordered strip of color cells, each labeled with real accessible text, showing a tonal or palette series.

entries.name: Row
entries.description: ui-row is the canonical layout primitive — a light-DOM custom element that lays its children out as a horizontal flex row.

entries.name: Sandbox Frame
entries.description: The sandboxed containment host for free-form, agent-authored HTML/CSS/JS (GenUI) — one native iframe, a closed postMessage bridge, and a fail-closed never-paint law.

entries.name: Segment
entries.description: The child button of ui-segmented-control, rendering only its label while the host supplies all geometry.

entries.name: Segmented Control
entries.description: A joined-button single-select toggle with one shared, animated highlight sliding between segments.

entries.name: Select
entries.description: ui-select is a single-select form control built on the Overlay controller (overlay-controller.lld.md · ADR-0043), rovingFocus, and selectionCommit.

entries.name: Slider
entries.description: ui-slider is a FACE form-associated Indicator-class Range control (extends UIRangeElement → UIFormElement, ADR-0042).

entries.name: Slider Multi
entries.description: ui-slider-multi is a FACE form-associated Range-class control (extends UIRangeElement → UIFormElement, ADR-0042).

entries.name: Sparkline
entries.description: An inline, axis-free line or area mark that shows the shape of a numeric series at a glance.

entries.name: Split
entries.description: A multi-pane container with user-resizable, draggable and keyboard-adjustable dividers between panes.

entries.name: Split Pane
entries.description: One resizable pane inside a ui-split container, with optional initial ratio, min, and max bounds.

entries.name: Stat
entries.description: ui-stat is the Display-class metric tile (ADR-0111, report family v1) — label + value + optional delta + optional caption as real, selectable DOM text.

entries.name: Status Stream
entries.description: A live status strip that streams work-in-progress entries and tail-follows the newest arrival.

entries.name: Swatch
entries.description: A bordered color box that shows one resolved color value alongside its token name as accessible text.

entries.name: Swiper
entries.description: ui-swiper is a CSS-native (scroll-snap) carousel family — the fleet's first scroll-snap surface (ADR-0124).

entries.name: Swiper Item
entries.description: ui-swiper-item is the slide of the ui-swiper family (swiper-family.lld.md LLD-C4) — an author-written wrapper around arbitrary content, one per logical slide.

entries.name: Swiper Label
entries.description: ui-swiper-label is an author-placed anchor whose light-DOM text becomes the owning ui-swiper's accessible name (swiper-family.lld.md LLD-C11, SPEC-R15).

entries.name: Swiper Paddles
entries.description: An author-placed anchor that the owning ui-swiper fills with previous/next navigation buttons.

entries.name: Swiper Pagination
entries.description: ui-swiper-pagination is an author-placed anchor the owning ui-swiper fills and wires wherever it is written (swiper-family.lld.md LLD-C9).

entries.name: Switch
entries.description: ui-switch is the FACE switch indicator control (extends UIIndicatorElement, ADR-0013): a pill track + sliding thumb representing a boolean ON/OFF value.

entries.name: Table
entries.description: A static data table with typed columns and record rows, rendered as a real native HTML table.

entries.name: Tabs
entries.description: A tab strip and panel container that switches visible content via keyboard-navigable, roving-focus tabs.

entries.name: Text
entries.description: ui-text is the Display-class text primitive — a light-DOM custom element rendering text on the fleet's M3-derived type scale.

entries.name: Text Field
entries.description: A form-associated text input with a contenteditable surface supporting thirteen typed input variants.

entries.name: Textarea
entries.description: A form-associated multi-line text input with a contenteditable surface — a long-form editable primitive, and a sibling of ui-text-field, not one of its modes.

entries.name: Theme Provider
entries.description: A coordination element that establishes a color-scheme, scale, and density subtree for its descendants.

entries.name: Timeline
entries.description: A static, authored chronology of ui-timeline-item rows showing an order history or audit trail.

entries.name: Timeline Item
entries.description: One rail row in a timeline or status stream, showing a status marker, label, timestamp, and optional detail.

entries.name: Toast
entries.description: A self-expiring, non-interrupting notification card shown in the platform's top layer via ui-toast-region.

entries.name: Toast Region
entries.description: ui-toast-region is the top-layer host ui-toast instances stack inside — the fleet's first transient notification surface (ADR-0112, feed-family.lld.md LLD-C8).

entries.name: Toolbar
entries.description: A flex action bar that arranges the consumer's own controls with role=toolbar and arrow-key roving focus.

entries.name: Tooltip
entries.description: ui-tooltip is a non-modal tooltip built on the Overlay controller (overlay-controller.lld.md · ADR-0043) and the native Popover API (popover=manual).

entries.name: Getting started
entries.description: How to consume agent-ui in your own app: the workspace packages and the one load-bearing CSS import order.

entries.name: Theming
entries.description: One theming subtree, three live axes: scheme (light/dark), scale, and density.

entries.name: Token reference
entries.description: Every colour role across every family, the numbered tonal primitives, plus the dimensional ramp.

entries.name: Sizing & density
entries.description: Control geometry is an explicit (scale x size) lookup, never a multiplier; density touches spacing only.

entries.name: Forms
entries.description: A form-provider coordinating three field-wrapped controls, one working example narrated concern by concern.

entries.name: Which component when
entries.description: A quick chooser between components that overlap in purpose, condensed from the A2UI catalog's own guidance.

entries.name: Changelog
entries.description: The shipping summary of agent-ui's milestones, newest-first.

entries.name: Super Shell
entries.description: ui-super-shell is the shell-archetype family's grammar ceiling (M5): a two-level recursive frame — header/rails/panes/canvas/footer, all optional, header-hosted per-side collapse.

entries.name: Chat Shell
entries.description: ui-chat-shell is a thin ui-super-shell preset for the chat archetype: header, nav-pane, content — no options side.

entries.name: Master Detail
entries.description: ui-master-detail is a docked list | detail arrangement over the shipped ui-split, drilling into one record.

entries.name: Settings
entries.description: ui-settings is a sections rail + panel, composing ui-master-detail for a schema-driven settings surface.

entries.name: Router
entries.description: @agent-ui/router: a memory-first SPA router whose route state lives in a kernel signal.

entries.name: Highlight
entries.description: @agent-ui/code/highlight: a swappable syntax-highlighter registry plus seven bundled, zero-dependency tokenizers.

entries.name: Agent Admin
entries.description: ui-agent-admin is a three-pane ui-split (chat canvas, prompts, settings) over ui-conversation and ui-settings, one shared SettingsStore, live-apply with no external model dependency.

entries.name: Layout Primitives
entries.description: The structural layout family — ui-row, ui-column, ui-list, ui-grid — sharing the UIContainerElement base and gap/align/justify props.

entries.name: A2UI Canvas
entries.description: A live A2UI payload rendering a real button through the shipped renderer, round-tripping its click as an action message.

entries.name: A2UI Catalog
entries.description: Every component the default agent-ui A2UI catalog declares, rendered live through the real renderer.

entries.name: A2UI Dynamic List
entries.description: A2UI v1.0's data-bound children: one ChildList template rendering one live element per array row.

entries.name: A2UI Generative Form
entries.description: One A2UI payload becomes a complete, validated, accessibly-labelled form, submitting a typed aggregate action.

entries.name: A2UI Patterns
entries.description: Five UIs an agent actually emits: a settings form, a destructive confirmation, a wizard, and more.

entries.name: A2UI Gallery
entries.description: Every composition on the A2UI example-seed shelf, rendered live through the same renderer.

entries.name: A2UI Streaming
entries.description: An agent streams a screen one JSONL line at a time; each line applies the moment it arrives.

entries.name: A2UI Live Agent
entries.description: A live-agent chat app: the agent's A2UI stream renders into a real canvas that round-trips actions as the next turn.

entries.name: A2UI Chat
entries.description: One scrolling chat log where the agent's narration streams live and its A2UI surfaces render inline, persisting across turns until closed.

entries.name: A2UI Authoring Guide
entries.description: How to author a catalog row and an example payload, the two things that teach an agent this fleet.

entries.name: A2A Tic-Tac-Toe Arena
entries.description: Two agents play tic-tac-toe through a deterministic referee, an isolation-proven Agent2Agent match.

entries.name: A2A Concepts & Demos
entries.description: The A2A corpus made readable: one card per admitted record, the wire shape it teaches, and why.

entries.name: A2A Artifact Feed
entries.description: A conversation carried over A2A, some turns bearing live A2UI artifacts.

entries.name: Gallery
entries.description: Every shipped component, browsable and filterable in one live grid.

entries.name: Changelog
entries.description: Every milestone as its own searchable record, loaded lazily as a separate per-entry index.

entries.name: Decision Records
entries.description: Every ratified ADR as its own searchable record, loaded lazily as a separate per-decision index.
